title: Encapsulation, Properties, and Descriptors · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A community library circulation coordinator. Staff need valid item, member, and loan objects that reject impossible state and explain corrections. Planned artifact: Deliver Trustworthy Library Domain Model with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define classes and create instances while distinguishing class objects from the instances they construct.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Use dataclass fields, defaults, factories, ordering, frozen behavior, and post-init validation deliberately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
